race.description: Weir’s IGA + Liquor Donald Mdn Plate
race.comment: Looks a race in two. ZETHEROS (9) has produced a couple of fine runs since returning from a spell. Flashed home to grab second when resuming over 1400m at Warrnambool then stepped up to the mile at Stawell last start and was narrowly denied after racing a lot closer. Gets the gun run from gate one and looks a great chance to go one better. IMPENDING SWAN (10) appreciated the step up in distance last time out at the second run of the campaign, driving hard late to be beaten under a length over 1400m at Echuca. Ready to tackle the mile now. THE CHARLATAN (8) last raced when beaten a whisker after racing wide over 2000m at Warrnambool in December. Four jump-outs since 23 April should have him forward enough to make an impact. HALEMO (4) will be better for the run but can bob up while fresh without surprising. CAROLINA ROSA (16) is back from a 19-week spell. Best of three runs in the maiden prep was a close fifth on debut at Colac. Can be competitive with a similar run today.
